name: Classic Aviator Sunglasses
description: UV400 polarized aviator sunglasses with gold-tone metal frame and gradient lenses. Lightweight and scratch-resistant.

name: Floral Summer Dress
description: Lightweight floral-print dress with adjustable spaghetti straps and a flowy A-line silhouette. Perfect for beach days.

name: Aloe Vera Sunscreen SPF 50
description: Reef-safe, water-resistant sunscreen enriched with aloe vera and vitamin E. Broad-spectrum UVA/UVB protection.

name: Wide-Brim Straw Beach Hat
description: Handwoven straw hat with a wide brim for maximum sun protection. UPF 50+ rated and packable for travel.

name: Sporty Slide Sandals
description: Cushioned slide sandals with a textured footbed and durable rubber outsole. Ideal for the pool or boardwalk.

name: Linen Relaxed Button-Down
description: Breathable linen-blend shirt with a relaxed fit, chest pocket, and mother-of-pearl buttons. Stays cool in humid heat.

name: Retro Round Sunglasses
description: Vintage-inspired round frames with blue-light blocking tinted lenses. Includes a microfiber cleaning pouch.

name: Denim Cutoff Shorts
description: Classic denim cutoff shorts with a frayed hem and five-pocket styling. Stretch denim for all-day comfort.

name: Canvas Beach Tote
description: Extra-large cotton canvas tote with inner zip pocket and reinforced handles. Holds towels, sunscreen, and a book.

name: Cooling Aloe Face Mist
description: Refreshing face mist with aloe vera, cucumber extract, and hyaluronic acid. Instant cooling hydration for sun-exposed skin.
